---
title: "CMIP"
author: "Penny Hunter"
date: "2025-11-21"
output: html_document
---
# Setup packages
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("~/Desktop/ASCI-GitHub/Masters-Thesis/setup.R")
```

```{r}
install.packages("arrow")
library(arrow)
CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245 <- read_parquet("input_data/all_GFDL-ESM4_ssp245_bc.parquet")
```

```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)


CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245 <-CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245 %>%
  mutate(
    time = as.Date(time),
    doy  = yday(time),
    state_id = as.integer(str_sub(GEOID, 1, 2)),
    tmax = tasmax,    # rename to match PRISM pipeline
    tmin = tasmin,
    ppt  = pr          # precipitation in mm/day
  )
```

```{r}
#if data not loaded go ahead and load 
maize_gs <- readRDS("input_data/maize_gs")
soybeans_gs <- readRDS("input_data/soybeans_gs")
```

```{r}
maize_gs <- maize_gs %>% select(-`...1`)
soybeans_gs <- soybeans_gs %>% select(-`...1`)
```




```{r}
# CMIP input is daily
CMIP <- CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245 %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(time),
    doy  = yday(time),
    state_id = as.integer(str_sub(GEOID, 1, 2)),
    prism_tmax = tmax,   # rename to match regression inputs
    prism_tmin = tmin,
    prism_ppt  = ppt,
    prism_vpdmean = daily_mean_vpd_tdew_bc_temp
  )
rm(CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245)
```

```{r}
maize_median <- read_csv("input_data/maize_median.csv")
soybeans_median <- read_csv("input_data/soybeans_median.csv")

# Maize
maize_condensed <- maize_median %>%
  select(state_name, state_id, growing_phase, start_doy) %>%
  filter(growing_phase %in% c("EMERGED", "HARVESTED")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = growing_phase,
    values_from = start_doy
  ) %>%
  rename(
    emerged = EMERGED,
    harvested = HARVESTED
  )

# Soybeans
soybeans_condensed <- soybeans_median %>%
  select(state_name, state_id, growing_phase, start_doy) %>%
  filter(growing_phase %in% c("EMERGED", "HARVESTED")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = growing_phase,
    values_from = start_doy
  ) %>%
  rename(
    emerged = EMERGED,
    harvested = HARVESTED
  )

```

```{r}
CMIP_maize <- CMIP %>%
  left_join(maize_condensed, by = "state_id") %>%
  filter(doy >= emerged & doy <= harvested)

CMIP_soy <- CMIP %>%
  left_join(soybeans_condensed, by = "state_id") %>%
  filter(doy >= emerged & doy <= harvested)
rm(CMIP)
rm(CMIP_GFDL_ESM4_ssp245)
rm(maize_condensed)
rm(soybeans_condensed)
rm(soybeans_median)
rm(maize_median)
```




```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# Row-wise KDD function
row_KDD <- function(tmax, tmin, thr = 30) {
  # hourly fraction
  Tf <- 0.44 - 0.46 * sin((pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9) +
        0.11 * sin((2 * pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9)
  hrlyT <- tmax * Tf + tmin * (1 - Tf)
  sum(pmax(hrlyT - thr, 0)) / 24
}

# Row-wise GDD function
row_GDD <- function(tmax, tmin, base = 5, cap = 30) {
  tmax <- pmin(tmax, cap)
  tmin <- pmax(tmin, base)
  Tf <- 0.44 - 0.46 * sin((pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9) +
        0.11 * sin((2 * pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9)
  hrlyT <- tmax * Tf + tmin * (1 - Tf)
  sum(pmax(hrlyT - base, 0)) / 24
}

# Apply using purrr::pmap_dbl for speed
CMIP_maize <- CMIP_maize %>%
  mutate(
    KDD = pmap_dbl(list(prism_tmax, prism_tmin), row_KDD),
    GDD = pmap_dbl(list(prism_tmax, prism_tmin), row_GDD)
  )

CMIP_soy <- CMIP_soy %>%
  mutate(
    KDD = pmap_dbl(list(prism_tmax, prism_tmin), row_KDD),
    GDD = pmap_dbl(list(prism_tmax, prism_tmin), row_GDD)
  )


```

```{r}

library(dplyr)

# For maize
CMIP_maize_season <- CMIP_maize %>%
  group_by(state_id, year) %>%   # change/add grouping columns if needed
  summarise(
    avg_tmax = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_tmin = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp = mean((prism_tmax + prism_tmin)/2, na.rm = TRUE), # optional mean daily temp
    total_precip = sum(precip, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_GDD = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_KDD = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# For soy
CMIP_soy_season <- CMIP_soy %>%
  group_by(state_id, year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_tmax = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_tmin = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp = mean((prism_tmax + prism_tmin)/2, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_precip = sum(precip, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_GDD = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_KDD = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()




```

```{r}
#filter for only counties in the yield model 
counties_combined <- readRDS("input_data/counties_combined.rds")


```


```{r}



# Keep only GEOIDs present in the counties dataset
counties_combined<- unique(counties_combined$fips)

# Aggregate CMIP maize data
CMIP_maize_season <- CMIP_maize %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% counties_combined) %>%  # only counties present in training
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%             # group by county and year
  summarise(
    GDD_sum = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    KDD_sum = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_sum = sum(precip, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_avg = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_avg = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

CMIP_soy_season <- CMIP_soy %>% 
  filter(GEOID %in% counties_combined) %>%  # only counties present in training
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%             # group by county and year
  summarise(
    GDD_sum = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    KDD_sum = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_sum = sum(precip, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_avg = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_avg = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
rm(CMIP_soy)
rm(CMIP_maize)
```

```{r}
#  Define formula

yield_formula <- function(crop_type) {
  as.formula(paste0(
    crop_type, " ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + ",
    "year:county_factor + I(year^2):county_factor"
  ))
}

#  Recreate models
# Maize - Irrigated
maize_irrigated_model <- lm(
  formula = yield_formula("irr"),
  data = maize_gs  # replace with your training dataset for maize irrigated
)

# Maize - Rainfed
maize_rainfed_model <- lm(
  formula = yield_formula("rainfed"),
  data = maize_gs  # replace with your training dataset for maize rainfed
)

# Soy - Irrigated
soy_irrigated_model <- lm(
  formula = yield_formula("irr"),
  data = soybeans_gs    # replace with your training dataset for soy irrigated
)

# Soy - Rainfed
soy_rainfed_model <- lm(
  formula = yield_formula("rainfed"),
  data = soybeans_gs    # replace with your training dataset for soy rainfed
)

```

#replace once saved 
```{r}
# Maize
maize_irrigated_model <- readRDS("input_data/model_maize_irr.rds")
maize_rainfed_model  <- readRDS("input_data/model_maize_rain.rds")

# Soybean
soy_irrigated_model <- readRDS("input_data/model_soy_irr.rds")
soy_rainfed_model  <- readRDS("input_data/model_soy_rain.rds")
```

```{r}

CMIP_maize_season <- CMIP_maize_season %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    prism_tmax     = tmax_avg,
    prism_tmin     = tmin_avg,
    prism_ppt      = precip_sum,
    GDD_sum_yearly = GDD_sum,
    KDD_sum_yearly = KDD_sum
  )

CMIP_soy_season <- CMIP_soy_season %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    prism_tmax     = tmax_avg,
    prism_tmin     = tmin_avg,
    prism_ppt      = precip_sum,
    GDD_sum_yearly = GDD_sum,
    KDD_sum_yearly = KDD_sum
  )

# Create county factor

CMIP_maize_season$county_factor <- factor(CMIP_maize_season$GEOID)
CMIP_soy_season$county_factor   <- factor(CMIP_soy_season$GEOID)





```
```{r}
# Make sure county_factor is factor
maize_gs$county_factor <- factor(maize_gs$county_factor)
maize_gs$county_factor <- factor(maize_gs$county_factor)

# 2. Refit model without county_factor
maize_irrigated_model <- lm(
  irr ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + year + I(year^2),
  data = maize_gs
)

maize_rainfed_model <- lm(
  rainfed ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + year + I(year^2),
  data = maize_gs
)

# 3. Predict
CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_irrigated <- predict(maize_irrigated_model, newdata = CMIP_maize_season)
CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_rainfed  <- predict(maize_rainfed_model,  newdata = CMIP_maize_season)

# 4. Check predictions
summary(CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_irrigated)
sum(is.na(CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_irrigated))  # should be 0

```

```{r}

# 2. Refit models without county_factor
soy_irrigated_model <- lm(
  irr ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + year + I(year^2),
  data = soybeans_gs
)

soy_rainfed_model <- lm(
  rainfed ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + year + I(year^2),
  data = soybeans_gs
)

# 3. Predict yields for CMIP data
CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_irrigated <- predict(soy_irrigated_model, newdata = CMIP_soy_season)
CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_rainfed  <- predict(soy_rainfed_model,  newdata = CMIP_soy_season)

# 4. Check predictions
summary(CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_irrigated)
sum(is.na(CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_irrigated))  # should be 0
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 1. Aggregate to get mean predicted yield per year
maize_mean <- CMIP_maize_season %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_irrigated = mean(pred_yield_irrigated, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rainfed = mean(pred_yield_rainfed, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

soy_mean <- CMIP_soy_season %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_irrigated = mean(pred_yield_irrigated, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rainfed = mean(pred_yield_rainfed, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# 2. Plot maize yields over time
ggplot(maize_mean, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_irrigated, color = "Irrigated")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_rainfed, color = "Rainfed")) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Maize Yields Over Time",
    y = "Yield",
    color = "Management"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# 3. Plot soy yields over time
ggplot(soy_mean, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_irrigated, color = "Irrigated")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_rainfed, color = "Rainfed")) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Soy Yields Over Time",
    y = "Yield",
    color = "Management"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Fix county factor levels
# -----------------------------

# Maize
CMIP_maize_season$county_factor <- factor(
  CMIP_maize_season$GEOID,
  levels = levels(maize_irrigated_model$model$county_factor)  # match training factor levels
)

# Soy
CMIP_soy_season$county_factor <- factor(
  CMIP_soy_season$GEOID,
  levels = levels(soy_irrigated_model$model$county_factor)  # match training factor levels
)

# -----------------------------
# Predict yields
# -----------------------------

# Maize
CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_irrigated <- predict(
  maize_irrigated_model, 
  newdata = CMIP_maize_season
)

CMIP_maize_season$pred_yield_rainfed <- predict(
  maize_rainfed_model, 
  newdata = CMIP_maize_season
)

# Soy
CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_irrigated <- predict(
  soy_irrigated_model, 
  newdata = CMIP_soy_season
)

CMIP_soy_season$pred_yield_rainfed <- predict(
  soy_rainfed_model, 
  newdata = CMIP_soy_season
)

```


```{r}
CMIP_maize_yearly <- CMIP_maize %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    prism_tmax = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_tmin = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmean = mean(prism_vpdmean, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmax = mean(prism_vpdmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmin = mean(prism_vpdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_ppt  = sum(prism_ppt, na.rm = TRUE),
    KDD_sum_yearly = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    GDD_sum_yearly = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    county_factor = as.factor(str_sub(GEOID, 3, 5)),
    state_factor  = as.factor(str_sub(GEOID, 1, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

CMIP_soy_yearly <- CMIP_soy %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    prism_tmax = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_tmin = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmean = mean(prism_vpdmean, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmax = mean(prism_vpdmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_vpdmin = mean(prism_vpdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    prism_ppt  = sum(prism_ppt, na.rm = TRUE),
    KDD_sum_yearly = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    GDD_sum_yearly = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    county_factor = as.factor(str_sub(GEOID, 3, 5)),
    state_factor  = as.factor(str_sub(GEOID, 1, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```


#linear models
```{r}
model_maize_irr <- lm(
  irr ~ prism_tmax + prism_tmin + prism_ppt +
    prism_vpdmean + KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly +
    county_factor + state_factor,
  data = maize_gs
)


model_maize_rain <- lm(
  rainfed ~ prism_tmax + prism_tmin + prism_ppt +
    prism_vpdmean + KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly +
    county_factor + state_factor,
  data = maize_gs
)


model_soy_irr <- lm(
  irr ~ prism_tmax + prism_tmin + prism_ppt +
    prism_vpdmean + KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly +
    county_factor + state_factor,
  data = soybeans_gs
)


model_soy_rain <- lm(
  rainfed ~ prism_tmax + prism_tmin + prism_ppt +
    prism_vpdmean + KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly +
    county_factor + state_factor,
  data = soybeans_gs
)

```

```{r}
saveRDS(model_maize_irr, "input_data/model_maize_irr.rds")
saveRDS(model_maize_rain, "input_data/model_maize_rain.rds")
saveRDS(model_soy_irr,   "input_data/model_soy_irr.rds")
saveRDS(model_soy_rain,  "input_data/model_soy_rain.rds")
```

C
